title: Luma Lull Loom
poem_text:
Pipple pop the wispy weave,
Drifty droom the dreams believe.
Snickle snee the fluffly air,
Glimmer glint the whispers there.
Tizzle tup the softest sound,
Floating feathers all around.
Will the luma lull tonight,
Spin the stars in silver light?
cover_context: A child lying on a cloud-like bed, watching glowing threads weave patterns in the dark blue sky.
style_prompt: Children's musical poem, ukulele and soft bongos, 101 BPM, dreamy and wondering, spacious, leaves room to think, clear warm vocal, every word easy to understand
